== Notes for [[Item:Q3005|Q3005]] ==

Judeus de castela em Portugal no final da idade Media: onomástica familiar e mobilidade - Maria José Pimenta Ferro Tavares.

http://sefarad.revistas.csic.es/index.php/sefarad/article/viewFile/693/797

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADAB428A1EFBBFA9822EF79916CA0AF
geni:6000000027453532567


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
